---
title: constant-logical-expr
description: "Detect constant logical expressions."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect constant logical expressions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if false && connected { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready && connected { start() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only constant-logical-expr`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
